industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: CK Power Public Company Limited
summary: CK Power Public Company Limited, through its subsidiaries, generates and sells electricity and steam in Thailand and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Generation of Electricity from Hydroelectric Power, Generation of Electricity from Solar Power, and Generation of Electricity from Thermal Power. As of December 31, 2019, it had a total installed capacity of 2,167 megawatt (MW). The company operates 2 hydro power plants with a capacity of 1,900 MW in the Laos People's Democratic Republic; a solar power plant with a capacity of 8 MW located in Pakthongchai, Thailand; a solar power plant with a capacity of 6 MW in Dan Khun Thot, Thailand; a solar power plant with a capacity of 8 MW located in Mae Chan, Thailand, 5 solar rooftop and a solar farm power plants with a capacity of 6.73 MW; and 2 thermal power plants with the capacity of 117.5 MW and 120 MW located in Bangpa-in, Thailand. It also provides consulting and other services related to electricity generating projects. CK Power Public Company Limited was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
